data.title: Tranquility AI partners with Mount Aloysius College, integrates TimePilot in criminology program, first in the nation.
data.description: In Laurel, Maryland, Tranquility AI, a prominent investigative technology solutions provider, revealed their initial criminology university affiliation with Mount Aloysius College's esteemed Criminology Program. This groundbreaking collaboration marks Mount Aloysius as the first criminology program in the country to incorporate Tranquility AI's TimePilot evidence analysis platform into its curriculum. Alongside this partnership, Tranquility AI disclosed their academic venture.

GOOGLE FACES NEW EU ANTITRUST PROBE OVER SEARCH ADS, WITH COMMISSION ALLEGING IT ARTIFICIALLY RAISES AUCTION PRICES, POTENTIALLY ADDING TO €9.5 BILLION IN FINES.

data.title: The Uptown Agency launches Uptown Brands, an investment platform backing select companies they serve on 09-Feb-2026.
data.description: The Uptown Agency has introduced Uptown Brands, an investment platform supporting specific companies served by the agency. The announcement was made on 9th February 2026 by The Uptown Agency via PR Newswire. Key details include new opportunities for select companies under the agency's umbrella.

data.title: CarbonQuest lands first carbon capture & sequestration project on Canadian gas compressors, showcasing tech viability.
data.description: A recent showcase project in Spokane, Washington on February 12, 2026, highlighted the success of CarbonQuest's technology on gas processing compressors. This marks a significant milestone as the first potential carbon sequestration project for the company. CarbonQuest, a prominent distributed carbon capture technology provider, demonstrated the effectiveness of their technology in reducing emissions. This showcases the company's commitment to sustainability and environmental protection.

data.title: Bountiful Financial launches FaithEnhanced™ Factor Indices based on S&P 500 issued on 10-Feb-2026 through PR Newswire.
data.description: Bountiful Financial has announced the introduction of their new FaithEnhanced™ Factor Indices, which are derived from the S&P 500. The news was released on 10-Feb-2026 by Bountiful Financial LLC via PR Newswire. This update includes adjustments to the original information. The indices offer enhanced factors based on faith and aim to provide unique investment opportunities for potential clients. These indices are designed to incorporate religious considerations into investment strategies. Investors can now access these innovative indices to potentially diversify their portfolios with the influence of faith-based factors.

data.title: National Genealogical Society appoints Major General (Retired) Garrett Yee as Honorary Chairman of Veteran Bounty Land Records fundraising campaign.
data.description: In Silver Spring, Maryland, on February 10, 2026, the National Genealogical Society (NGS) revealed Major General (Retired) Garrett S. Yee as the Honorary Chairman of the Veteran Bounty Land Records (VBLR) capital fundraising campaign. This initiative aims to raise funds for preserving historical records related to veterans.

data.title: National Assistance League appoints Judy Zulfiqar as Executive Director, brings 20+ years of experience to 100-year organization.
data.description: A highly skilled leader in the nonprofit sector, Judy Zulfiqar, MBA has been chosen as the new Executive Director of the National Assistance League, an organization with a century-long history. With over 20 years of experience, Zulfiqar is anticipated to enhance the organization's operations and impact significantly. The announcement was made on February 12, 2026, in Burbank, California.

data.title: Malibu Boats, Inc. received five NMMA CSI Awards for its brands at the 2026 Miami International Boat Show.
data.description: On February 12, 2026, Malibu Boats, Inc. (Nasdaq: MBUU), an American company specializing in designing and producing top-tier salt and freshwater recreational powerboats, disclosed that five of its product lines received accolades in the form of Customer Satisfaction Index (CSI) Awards from the National Marine Manufacturers Association (NMMA). The ceremony took place during the 2026 Miami International Boat Show and Innovation Awards Breakfast.

data.title: Virtuals Protocol launches revenue network for agent-to-agent AI commerce, with over 18,000 agents negotiating and earning.
data.description: In Hong Kong on February 12, 2026, at Consensus Hong Kong, it was announced that Virtuals Protocol launched the first revenue network in which autonomous AI agents can negotiate, execute, and earn money. With a staggering count of over 18,000 agents, this platform empowers the largest AI agent economy worldwide. Users stand to capture ongoing revenue as these agents operate within the network.

data.title: Commercial services sector sees increased investor interest fueled by attractive fundamentals, according to a report by BGL. (character count: 108)
data.description: On February 12, 2026, in New York, it was reported that investor interest in the commercial services sector remains robust, propelled by favorable fundamentals. A recent industry report by the Commercial Services investment banking division of Brown Gibbons Lang & Company (BGL) highlighted this trend. The report indicates significant growth potential within the sector, with promising opportunities for investment.

data.title: RoboDK introduces CAM solution to speed up robotic machining deployment by automatically generating robot code, cutting deployment times.
data.description: In Montreal, RoboDK, a prominent company in robot simulation and offline programming software, has introduced RoboDK CAM. This new software aims to streamline the setup process for automated machining cells. Unlike traditional methods that rely on manual programming by specialists in vendor-specific languages, RoboDK CAM simplifies the process by generating robot code directly from CAD designs and digital simulations. This innovative approach significantly decreases deployment times and offers a more accessible solution for users.

data.title: Clearsight Advisors assisted StoneTurn in acquisition by Province, becoming exclusive financial advisor in successful transaction.
data.description: In McLean, Virginia, on February 12, 2026, Clearsight Advisors, Inc. shared news of a recent accomplishment in its Professional Services Practice. Acting as the sole financial advisor, Clearsight facilitated a lucrative transaction for StoneTurn, a company owned by MML Capital. This development underscores Clearsight's proficiency in this sector, showcasing its ability to navigate successful deals for its clients.

Russia has ordered a block on WhatsApp and blamed parent company Meta which it labeled ‘extremist’ and ‘terrorist’ and said the company had refused to comply with the country’s laws. Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said Russians should use state-approved national messenger app

data.title: Howard and Georgeanna Jones Foundation award $75,000 in Bridge Funding; partnership with AAOGF.
data.description: In Virginia Beach on February 12, 2026, the Howard and Georgeanna Jones Foundation for Reproductive Medicine, known as the Jones Foundation, revealed a new collaboration with the American Association of Obstetricians and Gynecologists Foundation (AAOGF). The initiative aims to further advancements in reproductive medicine. The specific details about the partnership were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: DifGen Pharma gets USFDA nod for 0.1% Fluorometholone Ophthalmic Suspension, expanding its generic portfolio.
data.description: In Miramar, Florida on February 12, 2026, DifGen Pharmaceuticals, a prominent generic pharmaceutical company in the U.S., revealed that they have obtained approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (USFDA) for their Fluorometholone Ophthalmic Suspension, 0.1%. This product is categorized as a complex generic medication.

data.title: JCP&L's $95M reliability project in Hunterdon, Ocean, and Warren Counties reduces outages for thousands of customers.
data.description: The $95 million New Jersey Central Power & Light (JCP&L) project is nearing completion with recent improvements in Hunterdon, Ocean, and Warren Counties. These upgrades have significantly reduced power outages for thousands of customers, marking the halfway point of the project as of February 12, 2026.
